acceptance_targets: [ch11-f003] Pass if the exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:342, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:352, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:366, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:390 no longer contains three consecutive strategic prompts answered by bare one-word confirmations from Inez, and if within two rebuttal turns after Silas suggests proving the mother line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:342 the dialogue advances to a new tactical or emotional consequence not already stated by Vero. Fail if the exchange still reads as a schematic Q-and-A ladder.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:342, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:352, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:366, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:390 no longer contains three consecutive strategic prompts answered by bare one-word confirmations from Inez, and if within two rebuttal turns after Silas suggests proving the mother line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:342 the dialogue advances to a new tactical or emotional consequence not already stated by Vero. Fail if the exchange still reads as a schematic Q-and-A ladder.
findings.problem: The final strategy exchange turns into a yes/no confirmation ladder. Silas proposes a bad answer, Inez corrects it, and then the scene keeps diagramming the same anti-monopoly idea through serial one-word replies. That makes Inez function as a validator more than a fully pressuring speaker and drains force from the chapter's key pivot.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the deduction chain anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:342, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:352, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:366, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:390. Cut at least one round of serial confirmations, and replace at least one of Inez's bare "Yes" answers at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:368, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:372, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:376 with a line in her practical register that names use, maintenance, household need, or another concrete consequence. The scene should move from Silas's ownership mistake to the anti-monopoly tactic with sharper leverage, not repeated assent.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), and pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's strange civic biology, vulgar humor, erotic consequence, and class abrasion. When a choice appears between the cleaner version and the truer, messier one, choose the messier version so long as causality and character truth remain exact. Treat the city's slime, smell, heat, and appetite as part of the novel's beauty rather than embarrassment to be polished away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, shame, hunger, class humiliation, bodily mess, or economic pressure starts drifting into decorous vagueness, rewrite until the scene carries concrete sensory and social cost on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should signal emphasis, class performance, ceremonial language, or Gideon's deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate crowd scenes with cleanup, ritual with labor, public humiliation with private tenderness, and single-sweep chapters with multi-scene accumulations; no two consecutive chapters should feel built from the same emotional weather, dialogue density, or scene rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-aware but not museum-stiff; vivid, bodily, class-conscious, and willing to be ugly or funny without slipping into arch parody or modern snark.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored to Silas Vale for the full novel, with no head-hopping and no neutral historian voice; Inez remains legible through observed action, dialogue, and the objects she shares.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Elastic and pressure-sensitive: quick comic snap in public scenes, thicker sensory accumulation in labor and erotic passages, and hard clean sentences at moments of shame or decision.
